items.question: What is SoundLax?
items.answer:
SoundLax is a minimalist sound environment app designed for focus, relaxation, and sleep.

The goal is simple: less friction, better atmospheres, and quicker access to the sounds you actually want to hear.

items.question: Does SoundLax work offline?
items.answer: Short answer: Yes. Some sounds may require an internet connection depending on how they are streamed or updated. Offline support may expand over time.

items.question: How does Premium work?
items.answer:
SoundLax Premium unlocks:

  • Unlimited listening
  • Premium sound environments
  • Curated atmosphere mixes
  • Sleep-focused environments
  • Living backgrounds
  • Future sound updates

Subscriptions are managed through your Apple ID account.

items.question: How do I manage or cancel my subscription?
items.answer:
You can manage subscriptions anytime in:

Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions

items.question: I found a bug or issue
items.answer:
Please go to Settings and find Help and Support. Please send us your:

  • device model
  • iOS version
  • what happened before the issue occurred

This helps us fix things faster.

items.question: Will more sounds be added?
items.answer: Yep, but carefully. We want SoundLax to grow slowly with high-quality environments and curated sound spaces, without becoming overwhelming or cluttered.
